description: Deke finds Sequoia hiding and tries to explain the dire situation. As they attempt to flee, they're ambushed by Pax, only for Mack to intervene and assist their escape. Deke devises a plan to lead Jaco on a wild chase through the building, intending to neutralize Sarge's team using his VR tech. The sequence is both suspenseful and laced with Deke's signature comedic flair.

transcript.line: Okay, look, just listen to me, all right? There are people out there that are after me, okay, and I don't know why. I think it's because I'm not supposed to be here. Like, I'm not supposed to exist in this reality. Do you remember I explained this to you on the Playa?
Once again, this is all about you.
No, just... This... But this time it is about me. It... Look. If there's one thing I know how to do, it's run away and survive, so you're gonna follow me, okay? Are you ready?
Okay. Oh, well, maybe we should just...
Yeah, let's... It's all good. We don't need...
